title: rhamnus frangula f. heterophylla
intro: Rhamnus frangula f. heterophylla, also known as Buckthorn or Alpine Buckthorn, is a shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high content of anthraquinone glycosides, which have been shown to have laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rhamnus frangula f. heterophylla include supporting digestive health, reducing inflammation, and potentially helping to lower cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
